battleDrills.name: Assaulters
battleDrills.text: Models in this Unit cannot be Targeted by Overwatch when Repositioning.

citations.excerpt: Assaulters: Models in this Unit cannot be Targeted by

battleDrills.name: Chaff
battleDrills.text: Place a Smoke Token (Chaff) within 6” of a Model in this Unit before Activating. Chaff Smoke Tokens Dissipate on a 10+.

citations.label: OCR battle drill cross-check
citations.excerpt: Chaff: Place a Smoke Token (Chaff) within 6” of a Model in this Unit

battleDrills.name: Stims
battleDrills.text: Models in this Unit gain +2 Movement for their Activation.

citations.label: OCR battle drill cross-check
citations.excerpt: Stims: Models in this Unit gain +2 Movement for their Activation.

rules.name: Harlow First Reaction Force
rules.text: Harlow First Reaction Force Units gain +2 Movement when Sprinting.

citations.label: OCR force rule cross-check
citations.excerpt: Harlow First Reaction Force Units gain +2 Movement

battleDrills.name: Close Assault
battleDrills.text: Models in this Unit may Move 2” after their Activation ends, only if it would bring them into CQC with an Enemy Model.

citations.label: UN Raid Force Alpha force back

battleDrills.name: Cross Fire
battleDrills.text: If more than one Model in this Unit Targets the same Enemy Model, their Weapons gain +1 Damage.

citations.label: UN Raid Force Alpha force back

battleDrills.name: Switchback
battleDrills.text: Place a Smoke Token within 4” of a Model in this Unit before Activating. All Models may be Moved up to 2” before Activating.

citations.label: UN Raid Force Alpha force back

rules.name: UN Raid Team Alpha
rules.text: All UN Raid Team Alpha UTG Assaulter and Specialist Units gain an additional D10 roll in all Skill Checks, including Shooting and Close Quarters Combat (CQC).

battleDrills.name: Overwhelming Fire
battleDrills.text: Return Fire Reactions that Target Models in this Unit with the Cyclic Special Rule may never roll more than 1D10.

battleDrills.name: Small Unit Tactics
battleDrills.text: Up to half of the Models rounding up in the Unit may make the Shoot Action during the Reposition step of their Activation. This will cost them their Action during their Activation. Afterward, the remaining Models in the Unit may Reposition and then make an Action.

battleDrills.name: Tactical Positioning
battleDrills.text: During this Activation, Overwatch Targeting Models in this Unit suffers -1D10.

rules.name: Boone Recon Force
rules.text: Once Per Round one non-AI or Powered Infantry Model may make the Data Attack Action.

armory.name: SMOKE GRENADE
armory.text: Place a Smoke Token within 4” of a Grunt Model in this Unit before Repositioning.

battleDrills.name: Linked
battleDrills.text: When a Model in this Unit makes the Ready Action, one Model in the Unit that has already made an Action may gain a Ready Token instead of the Model making the Action.

battleDrills.name: Targeting Smoke
battleDrills.text: Place a Smoke Token within 6” of a Model in this Unit. This Unit will ignore the effects of the Smoke Token during their Activation. Enemy Units will treat the Smoke Token as normal.

battleDrills.name: Thorax Shields
battleDrills.text: Models in this Unit gain +1D10 for Armour Checks during this Activation.

rules.name: Manticor Borz Group Force
rules.text: Manticor Borz Group Models ignore the first point of Damage suffered from a Blast Weapon.

abilities.name: Activation Control
abilities.text: One Unit may be Activated after this Unit without spending a Control Point.

abilities.name: Engineer Grouping
abilities.text: This unit does not count toward the Unit limit when grouped with Harlow engineers, and it cannot benefit from Force Cards.

abilities.name: Self Destruct
abilities.text: Remove this model after using this weapon.

specialists.name: Team Leader
specialists.description: When this Model would gain a Ready Token from the Ready Action, it may instead give it to a Model in the Unit that has already made an Action.

abilities.name: Activation Control
abilities.text: One Unit may be Activated after this Unit without spending a Control Point.

abilities.name: Initiative
abilities.text: If at least two Models from this Unit are on the Table, you may roll an additional D10 for Initiative. Use the highest result rolled.

specialists.name: Sidewinder
specialists.description: Sidewinder (2 uses) | Check one of these boxes to allow this Model to use its Action to make a Skill Check. If it passes, you may give a Unit with a Model within 12” of this Model a Pinned Marker.
